response: The email provides an April investor update highlighting key milestones such as reaching 10,000 monthly active users, securing an $8 million Series A term sheet at a $40 million pre-money valuation, and hiring a VP of Sales, alongside metrics including $85K monthly recurring revenue (up 12% month-over-month), a $120K monthly burn rate, and 11 months of runway post-raise. The fundraising is set to close on May 10.
